name: Gyro Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 8 large Pita breads, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
For patties: Preheat broiler or prepare barbecue. Combine ingredients lightly but thoroughly in a large bowl. Shape into 16 thin patties and broil, turning once, until cooked through as desired.
For sauce: Combine first 4 ingredients in a small bowl. Add garlic powder, salt, and pepper to taste.
To assemble sandwich, place 1 meat patty in each pita half and top with yogurt sauce and onion slices.
